commands.narrative:
**Roster:** No changes since yesterday — added: none, removed: none, toggled: none.

**Headline:** v25-bot-excl-climbing holds score=100 with all 6 promotion gates clear for the third consecutive day (n=276, drop3=+2.084 SOL, monthly=+12.14 SOL/mo); the shadow→live promotion remains the single highest-priority open action. v28-bot-excl-climbing-1s-ttp's drop3 technically recovered to +0.130 but 96% of profits concentrate in 3 trades — kill recommendation stands.

**Today's P&L:** 0 trades captured (report generated early; HIGH anomaly: graduation_rate_drop — 0 projected today vs 7-day median 190; NO_GRADS in pipeline for 623s). Yesterday: 385 trades across 86 strategies; live net +0.2165 SOL. Two live execution failures overnight: sell failure at 08:00 UTC escalated to needs_manual_close after 4 retries — operator attention required. Buy fail at 10:23 UTC.

**v25-bot-excl-climbing (score=100, STRENGTHENING):** Score reached 100 (was 85 yesterday). n=276, drop3=+2.084 SOL, total=+4.397 SOL, monthly=+12.14 SOL/mo. All 6 gates clear: n✓ drop3✓ total✓ monthly✓ Panel11-STABLE(wr_std_dev=1.7%)✓ Panel7-NOT-OVERFIT✓. Top-3 concentration=52.6% — healthy for fat-tail strategy. PROMOTABLE. Operator decision pending.

**v28-bot-excl-climbing-1s-ttp (score=82.97 — recommend kill):** Drop3 recovered from -0.503 (n=109) to +0.130 (n=138), technically unfreezing the gate. But top-3 concentration=96.3% (3.367/3.497 SOL) — the 1s-poll variant has no distributed edge. Hypothesis falsified at n=138. Recommend kill.

**v10-best-double (score=84.33, STABLE):** n=121, drop3=+0.639, monthly=+3.957 (margin +0.207 above 3.75 gate). Fragile — watch closely. Kill if drop3≤0 or monthly<2.0.

**Sub-100 WATCH:** v9shadow-vel20-top5 (n=72, drop3=+0.818, monthly=+4.74, STABLE, ~10 days to n=100). v9shadow-velmono-dev (n=50, drop3=+2.608, monthly=+5.50, DECAYING flag — monitor but leave-one-out is strongly positive).

**Cross-day:** vel 20-50+dd>-10% cluster (v10, v20, v28) showing DECAYING median edge 3+ days; v10 still gate-positive. 5 DECAYING edge-decay anomalies (v12, velmid-liq-mono, velmono-dev, v20-dd-base, v20-dd-tight). Synthetic pool rate 52% — known artifact, level2 passes.

**Operator next step:** (1) Push strategy-commands upsert to promote v25-bot-excl-climbing to live — score=100, 3 days at full bar. (2) Kill v28-bot-excl-climbing-1s-ttp via delete/toggle — 96% concentration argument overrides drop3 recovery. (3) Investigate needs_manual_close sell failure from 08:00 UTC.
